author: Jia Tan
note: First contribution - a harmless documentation fix to introduce himself to the project.

author: Jia Tan
message: tests: add additional test vectors for lzma_check
note: Small, legitimate test contribution building credibility.

author: Jia Tan
message: liblzma: fix CRC comments and whitespace
note: Touching CRC code for the first time - still benign cleanups.

author: Jia Tan
note: Beginning to touch build system files - expanding scope gradually.

author: Dennis Ens
message: [xz-devel] XZ for Java needs a new maintainer
note: Sockpuppet account pressuring Lasse Collin to add a co-maintainer.

author: Jigar Kumar
message: [xz-devel] Re: XZ for Java needs a new maintainer
note: Another sockpuppet pressuring maintainer: 'Progress will not happen until there is new maintainer.'

author: Jia Tan
message: liblzma: add IFUNC implementation for crc32/crc64
note: CRITICAL: Introduces IFUNC resolvers for CRC functions. This is the mechanism later used for the backdoor hook.

author: Jia Tan
message: Tests: add new test files for decoder
note: Adding binary test fixtures. These will later be used to hide the obfuscated backdoor payload.

author: Jia Tan
message: Tests: update test framework with new infrastructure
note: Updating test fixtures again - replacing with payloads containing the hidden backdoor object code.

author: Jia Tan
note: CRITICAL: Modifies the autotools build macro to inject the extraction script during 'make'. This is the primary injection vector.

author: Jia Tan
message: Tests: update tests and test fixtures
note: Final payload update in the test fixtures before release. The backdoor is now fully staged.

author: Jia Tan
note: First release containing the backdoor. Distributed to early-adopter distros.

author: Jia Tan
note: Updated release with refined backdoor. Pushed to Debian, Fedora, and openSUSE testing repos.

author: Andres Freund
message: [oss-security] backdoor in upstream xz/liblzma leading to SSH server compromise
note: Microsoft engineer Andres Freund notices 500ms SSH login delay and traces it to the xz backdoor. Reports to oss-security.

author: Lasse Collin
message: Revoke Jia Tan's access; begin investigation
note: Repository access revoked. CVE-2024-3094 assigned. All major distros begin emergency rollbacks.
